15.reason: [The output format requires space-separated integers and a newline, but puts() outputs the string as-is followed by a newline. Since s contains concatenated digits (e.g., '123'), it prints "123\n" instead of "1 2 3\n".]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The output format requires space-separated integers and a newline, but puts() outputs the string as-is followed by a newline. Since s contains concatenated digits (e.g., '123'), it prints "123\n" instead of "1 2 3\n".]
